source_pr.title: *: enable gosec
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #35345

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: *: enable gosec.

evidence: files: DEPS.bzl, br/pkg/lightning/config/bytesize_test.go, br/pkg/lightning/config/config_test.go, br/pkg/pdutil/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/storage/local.go, build/BUILD.bazel, build/linter/gosec/BUILD.bazel, build/linter/gosec/analysis.go, build/linter/misspell/BUILD.bazel, build/linter/util/util.go, build/nogo_config.json, ddl/ddl_api.go, executor/plan_replayer.go, executor/slow_query.go, executor/trace.go, expression/builtin_encryption.go, go.mod, go.sum, parser/auth/mysql_native_password.go, server/http_handler.go, server/plan_replayer.go, sessiontxn/isolation/BUILD.bazel, sessiontxn/staleread/BUILD.bazel, store/mockstore/unistore/lockstore/load_dump.go, testkit/testdata/testdata.go, util/benchdaily/bench_daily.go, util/security.go, util/table-filter/parser.go
